name: MJ Hegar
subject: It's go time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This team has what it takes to bring the fight to Sen. Cornyn and win in November.

|

| | It's go time, Peter.

This team has what it takes to bring the fight to Sen. Cornyn and **[win in November](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904ce/7f51f7bc/4d4dffe4/4ef07e25/1612458652/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200126.2nd__809__&amount=10&recurring=true")** , but we need to win the primary first -- and we have **less than one month** left until early voting begins in Texas.

We're building a Texas-sized grassroots campaign, and we need the resources to reach every undecided voter and tell them about the better future we want to build for Texas. **If you've been waiting for the right moment to make your first donation*, now is the time -- I need your support.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tina Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I am emailing you for $4. Let me briefly explain why.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200126-eom7?refcode=em200126-eom7&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=4") Friend -- I am emailing you for $4. Let me briefly explain why.

To take back the Senate in November, Democrats only need to flip four seats. But victory can only be guaranteed if we protect incumbents like myself.

Minnesota is a must-win state to take back the majority, which is why it's a top target for Donald Trump, special interests, and GOP mega-donors.

They all have their eyes on us because it's clear there is a real opening for Republicans in Minnesota. Winning here could maintain their grip on the majority and block any progress Democrats hope to make. So, I'm asking you today:

**Will you join our campaign to keep Minnesota blue and bring Democrats one step closer to taking back the Senate by chipping in $4 (or more!) before our first end-of-month deadline of 2020? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$4 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200126-eom7?refcode=em200126-eom7&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=4")

name: Roe v. Wade Alert (2)
subject: waiting for your answer...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Women's rights are under attack, Team.

Republicans in states across the country are passing extreme abortion restrictions, while their friends in Congress slash Planned Parenthood funding!

We MUST stand up and fight back. Top supporters like you are our last line of defense on women's rights, but we need to know where you stand. Please let us know before midnight tonight.
| | **Do you support Roe v. Wade?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Roe v. Wade Alert
Date: Mon, Jan 2, 2020 at 12:59PM
Subject: Breaking from the New York Times
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

**The New York Times: "More Than 200 Republicans Urge Supreme Court to Weigh Overturning Roe v. Wade"**
**Tell us before 11:59 p.m. - Do you support Roe v. Wade?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
**Women 's rights are under attack again, Team!** More than 200 GOP members of Congress called on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade and deny women the fundamental right to choose a safe abortion.
Republicans have been waging an all-out war on women's rights, passing extreme restrictions in the states and slashing Planned Parenthood funding in Congress. There are even extremist anti-abortion laws making their way to the Supreme Court RIGHT NOW - and with Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh on the bench, **Roe v. Wade has never been more at risk. **
**Democrats are the last line of defense for women 's rights. ****We 're fighting back, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us. Tell us before midnight:**
| | **Do you support Roe v. Wade?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY4NzY5MTMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY0MzE1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.

Team -- we'll make this short.
**Donald Trump just scheduled a rally in New Hampshire for the night before the primary.**
Flipping the Granite State to Republican leadership is a top priority for Trump. He's rallying his base, campaigning on a far-right agenda, and doing everything he can to unseat Granite State Democrats. And since Senator Hassan only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, we've got to respond.
**We 've set a 48-hour, $7,000 goal to help stop Trump's momentum. [We're asking you, everyone, because Maggie isn't relying on corporate special interests. clean_body: "" "" Team -- we'll make this short. Donald Trump just scheduled a rally in New Hampshire for the night before the primary. Flipping the Granite State to Republican leadership is a top priority for Trump. He's rallying his base, campaigning on a far-right agenda, and doing everything he can to unseat Granite State Democrats. And since Senator Hassan only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, we've got to respond. We 've set a 48-hour, $7,000 goal to help stop Trump's momentum. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" The 2020 election will set the stage for 2022 and beyond, so we've got to make sure we're prepared for anything. That's why this 48-hour goal to respond to Trump's New Hampshire efforts is so important. "" Thank you, Team Maggie ""

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you Rep. Moulton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
This endorsement comes with an implicit agreement -- that we selflessly work for this country and our constituents -- and that we exhibit the leadership necessary for a more promising future.
|
---

| | I am truly honored to have the endorsement of Congressman Seth Moulton's group -- Serve America. Seth's service to this nation as a member of Congress, as a community volunteer, and as a service member is laudable. I align myself with his sense of service above self. This endorsement comes with an implicit agreement -- that we selflessly work for this country and our constituents -- and that we exhibit the leadership necessary for a more promising future. **[I hope you can take a moment to read the note about Serve America from my campaign manager Kimberley and chip in to our campaign>> ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24db/33365068/4a6f8c53/3f8b9e93/2159800914/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_L1&amount=5")** Thank you, Michael Franken VADM, USN (ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa \--------Forwarded Message--------
From: Kimberley Boggus
Subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT:
Date: Wednesday, January 22, 2020 [](secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_hdr&amount=5) Friends -- We are excited to share that Congressman Seth Moulton's group -- _Serve America_ \-- endorsed the Admiral's candidacy for the U.S. Senate. **[Please join them with a $5 donation and your endorsement, as well>> ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24db/33365068/4a6f8c53/3f8b9eac/2159800914/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_L2&amount=5")** [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24db/33365068/4a6f8c53/3f8b9ead/2159800914/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_img&amount=5") _Serve America's_ goal is to ensure our government works for Americans by supporting life-long civil servants -- from enlisted Marines and hot-shot fighter pilots to CIA field officers and other government workers. I know the Admiral is pleased as punch that Congressman Moulton and the Serve America board have chosen to support his effort to lead for a better future. He will not let them down! Backing like this helps grow our grassroots network by connecting service-oriented Americans to our movement. But, your help is needed as well, team. [_**If you can, chip in right now and join this ever-growing group of patriots and leaders >> **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24db/33365068/4a6f8c53/3f8b9eae/2159800914/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_L3&amount=15") Thank you, Kimberley Boggus
Campaign Manager | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24db/33365068/4a6f8c53/3f8b9eaf/2159800914/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200126_serveamericakick_em_fr_ftr&amount=15")

"" "" Serve America's goal is to ensure our government works for Americans by supporting life-long civil servants -- from enlisted Marines and hot-shot fighter pilots to CIA field officers and other government workers. I know the Admiral is pleased as punch that Congressman Moulton and the Serve America board have chosen to support his effort to lead for a better future. He will not let them down! Backing like this helps grow our grassroots network by connecting service-oriented Americans to our movement. But, your help is needed as well, team. "" Thank you, Kimberley Boggus Campaign Manager | "" | | | Paid for by Franken for Iowa Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Franken for Iowa PO Box 3171 Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Enrique Pepen, Team Kennedy
subject: Just got back from my honeymoon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902b0/55b66746/22495759/80f88f7/2111254899/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | My name is Enrique. Joe's "body guy" on the road. It's a funny title, but in campaign-speak, that means everywhere Joe goes, I go - and that's _a lot_ of places! It also means I'm the guy who takes photos during the selfie line: A little bit about me. I grew up in Boston. I'm a proud Dominicano. My dad is actually the Spanish announcer for the Red Sox so, yes -- I'm a diehard fan. I married the love of my life, Rocio, last month, and we just got back from an amazing honeymoon in the Dominican Republic. Now we're busier than ever on the campaign trail. We're driving all over Massachusetts holding town halls and house parties where Joe can listen to people's hopes for our next Senator, and where he can talk to them about the movement we're building. And (of course) take some selfies! Here's the thing about Joe: _he never puts on an act._ I don't think he knows how. The honest, caring guy who shows up at all of those house parties and town halls and marches and everything ready to listen? That's the same guy he is as a boss and leader and friend. **And it's the same person he'll be as our Senator: someone who cares._Who shows up, ready to listen._** That's the Joe I know. And that's why I'm proud to be on Team Kennedy and fighting for a new kind of Senator. Vamos hacerlo! Enrique _Enrique Pepen
Special Assistant_ _[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902b0/55b66746/22495759/80f88f0/2111254899/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3")_ Joe believes the first job of a U.S. Senator is showing up -- and that is exactly what he is doing. 70 towns in the first 90 days on the trail and 14 town halls in January. Listening. Learning. **Help fuel our fight to send Joe to the U.S. Senate.** | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902b0/55b66746/22495759/80f88f1/2111254899/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-01-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902b0/55b66746/22495759/80f88f2/2111254899/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-01-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Can you feel the urgency?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c25/290287998/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Sometimes, the headlines of the day can be pretty dire. Catastrophic climate disasters. Violence at home and abroad. Corruption at the highest levels. One attack after another on our civil rights. But you know what? I am an optimist. 2020 is going to be a turning point that marks a new beginning, a new progressive era. **I know that our movement can elect a progressive Democratic president, keep the House, and take back the Senate. And then, we get to work, getting America back on track.** But to do that, we need to build a grassroots movement bigger than any we've ever seen. And that means starting right now. **That's why I've set an ambitious goal of 3000 grassroots donations for January.** [**Chip in $3. Stand strong with me.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c22/290287998/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-01-26-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") We are going to win all across America. We are going to turn back Trumpism. But only if we hustle flat-out until the election. That's why I'm asking for your support right now. [**please donate $3 right now. Be one of our 3000 grassroots donors this month.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c22/290287998/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-01-26-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") We can do this! **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c23/290287998/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-01-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c20/290287998/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-01-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c21/290287998/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-01-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f8a9/6cd27893/5352de8f/15862c5e/290287998/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-01-26-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Please read tonight.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6434%2E377263%2EIcbSYC)
Yang Gang, I hope you can let me explain why I need to make an ask of you in this moment. [After you read, please pitch in $10 or more tonight.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23354?t=5&akid=6434%2E377263%2EIcbSYC)

We set a big goal yesterday of raising $3 million before our FEC deadline on Friday night, and without a big jump in our numbers there’s no way we can hit it.

This goal is absolutely critical to keeping our momentum and staying competitive on the ground here in Iowa and in all the early states. Just this week we saw increased spending from the top candidates, and we’re starting to be dramatically outspent.

**The team and I are doing everything we can on the ground here to build support, but we need your help, Yang Gang. We know we cannot go into 2020 with the same establishment politicians who created these problems in the first place.**

The stakes are too high and our momentum is building too fast to lose it all over the final days. Please, pitch in $10 or more tonight: [https://act.yang2020.com/go/3M-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23354?t=6)

This is our moment,

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23354?t=7&akid=6434%2E377263%2EIcbSYC)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6434%2E377263%2EIcbSYC) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6434%2E377263%2EIcbSYC) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Warren 2020
subject: We only need 78 supporters from Pennsylvania to chip in today to reach our fundraising target by the end of the day. Thousands of supporters have already chipped in today -- will you be one of the 78 to help finish strong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We'll keep this email short: We've looked at today's fundraising totals and made some calculations -- the bad news is that we're behind our daily fundraising goal, but the good news is that it's... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a056/45c30650/1e6ac342e/66e19659/644111882/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Peter, **Big news just keeps coming! I am so excited to announce that we earned the endorsement of the Texas AFL-CIO.**

I am honored and humbled to receive the support of Texas’ largest labor organization. Our campaign was able to bring together dozens of labor unions including fossil fuel industry workers from Houston. I support a Green New Deal, which raised some concern, but ultimately we forged a commitment to make sure Texas workers are at the table as we move ahead to battle the crisis of climate change.

As we are gaining more and more support, our opponents are going to work harder to outpace us. That is why we need your support. **[Join the labor community and support our campaign today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14336876/150237178/203122784?refcode=em012620&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2MWFmYi0xNDQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4e95xoSseR2jaWTZFa40EixDg-TntwnuNfe_6BGQv0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14336877/150237179/203122784?refcode=em012620&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2MWFmYi0xNDQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4e95xoSseR2jaWTZFa40EixDg-TntwnuNfe_6BGQv0=)
As we continue to fight to return responsive leadership to Congress for the 10th District, I am proud to stand arm in arm with my brothers and sisters in the labor movement to bring about the reforms we need in Washington. There are a lot of attacks on labor and working people coming from Republicans today. They are working hard to take away your ability to organize and fight for better pay and working conditions. When I am in Congress, I will fight hard to expand your labor rights and I will stand up to Republicans trying to gut workers' rights.

**[But first, I need your help to get there. Will you support our campaign for Congress right now and chip in to send someone to Washington who will fight for your rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14336878/150237180/203122784?refcode=em012620&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2MWFmYi0xNDQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M4e95xoSseR2jaWTZFa40EixDg-TntwnuNfe_6BGQv0=)**

clean_body: Peter, Big news just keeps coming! I am so excited to announce that we earned the endorsement of the Texas AFL-CIO. I am honored and humbled to receive the support of Texas’ largest labor organization. Our campaign was able to bring together dozens of labor unions including fossil fuel industry workers from Houston. I support a Green New Deal, which raised some concern, but ultimately we forged a commitment to make sure Texas workers are at the table as we move ahead to battle the crisis of climate change. As we are gaining more and more support, our opponents are going to work harder to outpace us. That is why we need your support. = = As we continue to fight to return responsive leadership to Congress for the 10th District, I am proud to stand arm in arm with my brothers and sisters in the labor movement to bring about the reforms we need in Washington. There are a lot of attacks on labor and working people coming from Republicans today. They are working hard to take away your ability to organize and fight for better pay and working conditions. When I am in Congress, I will fight hard to expand your labor rights and I will stand up to Republicans trying to gut workers' rights. = = = = = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Will you help me with my speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I need your input before preparing my speech. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bde17605291fa7913ad1b55e2080799d00a3452c6b54206996193e4cb82a0ee11808e72883cfc5562005f0b6ba71674863f414eeb64062d3)
---

Friend,

On February 4th, I will stand before you and the rest of the Nation and give my **Official State of the Union Address** as President of the United States of America.

This Address will be unlike any other. Your President is in the middle of an all-out **IMPEACHMENT WAR,** and the Left is doing everything they can to try and take me down. They're trying to take you down.
---
|
I promise you that I won't go down without a fight, and I certainly won't let Chuck and Nancy's second-rate scare tactics keep me from addressing the American People.

But, before I get on that stage, I want to get your input. Last year, I went over **hundreds of thousands of survey responses** from Patriots across the Nation to help me prepare for my State of the Union Address. We're getting closer to the big day and I need your help again.

---
**[Please take the Official 2020 State of the Union Prep Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so I can review your answers in my office.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bde17605291fa7914c5f8c8a757854670f9212914c2ba7459366b01f02951183f47af2ee059220ed6c04aa7ea6ad0ec7c2cac3d010496d3e)**

---
|
It’s obvious that Democrats don't want me to speak - they’re afraid I’ll tell you the truth about what’s really going on up here in Washington. They’re afraid I’ll expose their nasty lies (which I will) and their corrupt partnership with the Fake News media.

_But I don 't care what _they_ want - I know YOU want me to speak and that's all that matters._

That's why, before I prepare my remarks, I want to hear from _real_ Americans, like YOU, who can truly describe the state of _OUR _Union.

**[Take the Official 2020 State of the Union Prep Survey NOW.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=214199fb8326c006267382061d4d77e5b62b7deee6be7bf4c01dda7def99be1e4e70b6938006b7ae520f8cae5e1911462d429d023768dbbd)**

Before I go up to that podium and give the most important **State of the Union Address** in the history of our country, I need to know what you think.

---
**I 'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES on February 3rd with my Campaign Manager, Brad Parscale.** We'll be looking for your answers because your input is critical to my speech.

name: Team Charles Booker
subject: BREAKING: Bolton reveals damning impeachment evidence!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY, LTD
body:
|
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: What happens if we don't catch up...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of this election year coming up in a few days.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200127-eom8?refcode=em200127-eom8&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team -- I am going to keep this message short and sweet.

We have our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of this election year coming up in a few days and supporters like you are a critical part of how we raise money. Every dollar you give to my campaign makes a meaningful difference in our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat.

Now according to my finance team, we're still behind on our grassroots goal by quite a bit. If we don't catch up soon, my Republican opponent could have a leg up on us as we move closer to Election Day. So, I'm asking:

**Can you chip in $10 to my re-election campaign before our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2020? subject: RE: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I want you to know where I stand, and I need to know where you stand, too.
|
---

| | The evidence is overwhelming. After months of investigation, it is clear that President Trump committed an impeachable offense when he withheld duly appropriated federal aid from a foreign country. The facts are clear, and no one is above the law -- that's why I strongly support impeaching the president. House Democrats upheld their oath to the Constitution to protect our country from all enemies, foreign and domestic. Now, it's the Senate's turn to do its job. [_**This is an issue of huge importance for our country and I need to hear your thoughts. Will you take our Official Impeachment Survey before it closes?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d390/3d199a51/2f09eb2f/7364edfb/1713395739/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200123p_a") Thank you, Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d390/3d199a51/2f09eb2f/7364edf8/1713395739/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDEyM3AiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200123p?refcode=kme200123p_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Preserving Our Energy Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Houston is a special place.

During my military service, I spent several years of my life traveling to different parts of our country and the rest of the world. In 2006, I was deployed to Baghdad, Iraq, where I saw a broken society. From 2010 to 2012, I was deployed to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, where I saw a society with radically different values than ours.

So take it from me when I say that what we have in Houston is special. Those who came before us built a city, a state, and a country in which everyone is given the opportunity to work hard and achieve the American Dream. While I thank my parents for raising me with conservative values and convictions, I also thank my creator that I was blessed to be born in a city and state that reflected those values.

The fabric of our nation, our fundamental values, and our way of life are under attack. Radical Democrats in California, New York and Washington are pushing the Green New Deal and other radical environmental reforms that would cripple our economy and put thousands out of work. Worse yet, proposals like the Green New Deal would damage Houston’s economy by striking at the heart of the energy capital of the world. One of the best examples of the threats we face comes in the fracking ban that Democrats are pushing.

Fracking has been a marvel of engineering. It gave us access to immense pools of energy, leading to lower energy prices and energy independence. Instead of embracing fracking, which has grown our energy economy considerably, Lizzie Fletcher and her Democratic colleagues have attacked it. When Members of the House attempted to protect fracking from future bans, Lizzie Fletcher voted against them. Why would someone, who claims to be a moderate do this?

Lizzie Fletcher said she would work with both sides to protect this district. What’s more important than protecting our energy jobs?

We know what happened to Pittsburgh when the steel industry failed. We know what happened to Detroit when the automotive industry failed. We cannot let the energy industry fail in Houston.

Instead of working for us, Lizzie Fletcher has proven that she only cares about her big donors in San Francisco and New York.

I’m running for Congress to be a voice for our district, our city and our state. That means standing up for what is most important to our community, and it starts with our energy economy.

I hope I can count on your support.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c5b49f25469845b98b597798ce9d8354&_e=R9jnUV8fkqq4VBP-vWaS4PymXkqmdhqtE23ry3j93RXXNo0-Jkin29csjsXh0PmoTvJDdnUAZlZXCkjvR8I6EP1Sw2rPvmGhv8Ozs48UixTAZ2CMk_q5wRtguOVUlhxobIlMBSjXVsROA0ncsTUXW6wMIFnioYCbs5QMdVw7s-nkOZaHjVPkD_kzoATsE9AI6vRd-99i9QmUGfar1b36-AKndAZY_Py3Ada1OMFhyChs7oL5HwGAB-e3Gl9tudQmScKx8PmSAfQVnQIsPJ75zcycGkv-G63k5P71MYz4lmM%3D)****

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: (bump) Susan Collins complained about Jerry Nadler's conduct during the impeachment trial, but she didn't have anything to say when Trump tweeted this:
body:
Susan Collins just proved once again that she won't stand up to Mitch McConnell or Donald Trump -- so it's time to elect a Senator who will.
**[Chip in $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed8/4bef7a87/6a8d138b/287f8948/3944623256/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMS12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200127-1-v2-a")**
Friends,
Last week, Senator Collins passed Chief Justice Roberts a note complaining about Jerry Nadler's conduct during the impeachment trial.
But she doesn't have anything to say when Trump tweets and threatens Adam Schiff:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed8/4bef7a87/6a8d138b/287f8948/3944623256/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMS12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200127-1-v2-a")
**********[FIGHT BACK](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed8/4bef7a87/6a8d138b/287f8948/3944623256/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMS12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200127-1-v2-a")**********
Apparently Susan Collins is saving all of her disappointment for Democrats! She is never going to stand up to Mitch McConnell or Donald Trump -- so it's time to elect a Senator who will.
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate right now. Help us defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed8/4bef7a87/6a8d138b/287f8948/3944623256/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMS12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200127-1-v2-a")**
Thanks for being a part of the team that's going to flip this Senate seat.
Keep fighting,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed8/4bef7a87/6a8d138b/287f8948/3944623256/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMS12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200127-1-v2-a")**********

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: The Nation: “Georgia should be all-hands-on-deck for progressives nationally”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14352318/150375763/664205141?refcode=em012720-header&refcode2=c122e98b-4a41-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTIyZTk4Yi00YTQxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAbAbFrS7_FsOUfWSj1a9zEnCRyW7IyoyjjWKaKhKdo=) **** | | Friend, **The Nation magazine just labeled Georgia as one of the top 3 Senate battlegrounds in the 2020 election.** _“Georgia should be all-hands-on-deck for progressives nationally.” —The Nation_ We can win this election.

Polls, previous election turnout, and most importantly, the response we’ve been seeing across Georgia as Teresa has traveled to activist meetings, town halls, and local Democratic committees point to us running neck-and-neck against David Perdue — **despite the flood of corporate PAC money Republican donors are sending his way.**

**[If we can be this close right now — within single digits of Donald Trump’s handpicked senator, the ONLY one to receive help from Trump’s joint fundraising committee — then we can win Georgia. We're about to ask for more from this grassroots team than we've ever asked before, because there's massive work ahead of us to win this election.

We're up against the most corrupt president in our history, and the Republicans who look away from his dangerous behavior to keep themselves in power. We're up against rich and powerful special interests who are just fine with the way our country is, and will do whatever it takes to prevent change.

**Winning is not going to be easy, so we're going to be transparent with you: we're setting a huge goal to raise $3.5 million before the FEC deadline on January 31. The Iowa caucuses in a few days are just the beginning of this primary election, and $3.5 million is what it's going to take to power our comprehensive organizing, advertising, and voting outreach plans in the beginning of February.**

The Iowa caucuses in a few days... | | | "" We're about to ask for more from this grassroots team than we've ever asked before, because there's massive work ahead of us to win this election. We're up against the most corrupt president in our history, and the Republicans who look away from his dangerous behavior to keep themselves in power. We're up against rich and powerful special interests who are just fine with the way our country is, and will do whatever it takes to prevent change. Winning is not going to be easy, so we're going to be transparent with you: we're setting a huge goal to raise $3.5 million before the FEC deadline on January 31. The Iowa caucuses in a few days are just the beginning of this primary election, and $3.5 million is what it's going to take to power our comprehensive organizing, advertising, and voting outreach plans in the beginning of February. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We know that $3.5 million is an ambitious goal to hit in just five days, it's because we're ambitious about the work we have to do. The race to victory on election day will be a marathon, but the next few weeks are going to be an all-out sprint. We need to hit this goal in order to keep up our plans to win in the primary election and sustain our moment. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: massive problems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
The new state law giving driver’s licenses to illegal immigrants is causing massive problems for law enforcement, federal immigration officials and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=88A103A1A1305)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

The new state law giving driver’s licenses to illegal immigrants is causing massive problems for law enforcement, federal immigration officials and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security.

Max Rose didn’t join with other members of New York’s Congressional Delegation to urge a U.S. Department of Justice review of the law’s constitutionality. This is shocking considering he sits on the Homeland Security committee.

The law has denied local law enforcement access to important information they need to solve crimes and it even requires the DMV to give illegal immigrants a heads up that federal agents are seeking them. It’s outrageous that elected officials are undermining our law enforcement by giving illegal immigrants with warrants a head start.
[

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Read the Transcript!’
body:
President Trump’s legal team began its case with something the President has said repeatedly: "Read the transcript yourself!" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df477bbf07&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Read the Transcript!’**

“Long before Democrats finished making their marathon impeachment case Friday night, momentum had deserted them. The loops of repetition had gone from annoying to unbearable and the wild assertions got even wilder as their talk, talk, talk became a trial of its own,” Michael Goodwin writes in the _New York Post_.

President Trump’s legal team on Saturday “began with something Trump has said repeatedly, including to me when I interviewed him Jan. 7: ‘Read the transcript and you’ll see exactly what it is.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f35240fb4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| House Democrats’ impeachment probe “sounds like something out of Kafka. It would never be tolerated in the U.S. judicial system: no competent judge would bar an accused from attempting to prove his defense; and if one did, any conviction would be reversed on appeal,” former Assistant U.S. Attorney Andrew McCarthy writes for _[National Review](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d0916d44c&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “The Democrats’ decision to push through a partisan, politically motivated, sham impeachment that lacked any sort of due process, constitutional basis, evidence, or facts, has and will cause irreparable harm to our country . . . In reality, the Democrats’ work to take down our duly elected president began years ago,” Rep. Jeff Duncan (R-SC) writes in _[Greenville News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67521529cc&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Kobe Bryant, despite being one of the truly great basketball players of all time, was just getting started in life. He loved his family so much, and had such strong passion for the future. The loss of his beautiful daughter, Gianna, makes this moment even more devastating,” President Trump tweeted yesterday. The President’s words came after news broke that the 41-year-old former All-Star and his 13-year-old daughter were among the victims of a helicopter crash in California, Aris Folley reports in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dfa42b623a&e=3ee4985eea)_.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Read before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
We're
almost there.

Tomorrow is the special election in Texas HD 28. We’re on the verge of
helping Eliz Markowitz win and flip a critical seat from red to blue.

That would bring us one step closer to Democratic control of the Texas
State House for the first time in decades. However, even with a win
tomorrow, we would still need to flip eight more seats to win a majority.

That’s where you come in. Thanks to generous supporters like you, we were
able to knock on more than 38,000 doors in HD 28 alone (in fact, our
grassroots power grew so big that the GOP got scared and started busing in
volunteers).

Now, we need to replicate that organizing success in at least eight more
districts — which we can only do with support from generous people like
you. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42154?refcode=ema20200127-78117&t=1019&akid=78117%2E444211%2EEQOWiH ]On the eve of Election Day, will you make a donation to help us
hit the ground running and start immediately organizing in all of the
districts we need to win?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42154?refcode=ema20200127-78117&t=1020&akid=78117%2E444211%2EEQOWiH ]Donate

Flipping these seats and winning control of the Texas State House would
directly impact the lives of almost every single Texan.

Not only would it give us the chance to change those nearly 29 million
lives for the better, but turning Texas blue would send a shockwave
throughout the political world. It would show how important — and vital —
grassroots organizing is to Democratic victory.

All of that is within our grasp. We can make it happen. But for us to win
tomorrow — and beyond — we need your help; it’s going to take a lot of
resources to knock on the hundreds of thousands of doors we’ll need to.

We’re in the home stretch for HD 28, so let’s leave it all on the road.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42154?refcode=ema20200127-78117&t=1021&akid=78117%2E444211%2EEQOWiH ]Will you make a gift today to support our work to win this seat, and
many more seats to come?

Thank you for everything,

- Powered By People team

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42154?refcode=ema20200127-78117&t=1022&akid=78117%2E444211%2EEQOWiH ]Donate

I’m personally reaching out to you because I have a critical message to share about the 2020 elections.
Fellow Patriot, I’m personally reaching out to you because I have a critical message to share about the 2020 elections.
Here’s the situation: We’re in the middle of a ruthless fight to end socialism, and we can’t fight back without your help!
[ **END SOCIALISM TODAY** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=f651d5e079f2424a837314d42c46f814&_e=3fcftuySzygwFXw4a_CZ7YKy3j5-jsd-_F733c_Xnj9pdtaxg7m4XRToE5w1hIhYJOftU6mC2Yl8xDv9smiLWdplLmD0rQDo7__8Nc8fNrDpnRf-g-sxPOw7op6Zjb19x7Ha5ilQzHfaYrXWc4a-P3XKsQj7BhKPF2A6i7ox9XH_jWvlqoyjyzsY_wClurEaDGxQO_jc-OcGTgxqjToYpM_B_vesC8BqP0irmy1qhdu2BfYHLA5PaEoT2dHeyjLs2dVzED7F7bwAw_Zk4zzKqsNMqMteN8VLk6Nfngv6zOAcJqGLrtSh_39QhFdjueeGrkMxsGS6lGBbk-924EHAJzvPZhqTWX9KvNvqBksvENRfv0LbCrWaUpnTrqP7LxYeHY9zSJ81x0NBm_c7thLpGdL0snmuiNwdXAZWwERISVjuT7c1Dut17_3WymZPLDObZwjbwJw6gtxNDla5dP3_Fw%3D%3D) Not many legislators can boast the credentials that Brian Fitzpatrick can, and as 2020 quickly approaches, we need your help to ensure that a proven legislator is able to remain in office.
Without a problem solver like Brian in Congress, we will see the **devastating effects of socialism and the damage it causes to the people of Pennsylvania and our nation. ** **But we can STOP this from happening!** The pathway to taking back the House in 2020 runs directly through Pennsylvania. **And that means the fight for freedom begins with you!**
[ **JOIN THE FIGHT** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=f651d5e079f2424a837314d42c46f814&_e=3fcftuySzygwFXw4a_CZ7YKy3j5-jsd-_F733c_Xnj9pdtaxg7m4XRToE5w1hIhYJOftU6mC2Yl8xDv9smiLWdplLmD0rQDo7__8Nc8fNrDpnRf-g-sxPOw7op6Zjb19x7Ha5ilQzHfaYrXWc4a-P3XKsQj7BhKPF2A6i7ox9XH_jWvlqoyjyzsY_wClurEaDGxQO_jc-OcGTgxqjToYpM_B_vesC8BqP0irmy1qhdvmz1LCjv4DRl56akLqIoqI4QoOBbpu2qPx8Ap7ofWxdohrkspzUZQNpoRqqaY2rtNw0P2SEltXtn-rsGItTaF4RQB27ulnYhK7u10sFkYiEVpYAf4La24uXG1x-XHUIibxYXEQ7sysY43ySQ-JHH9mkUxaFu1z3qRCue60GCn5FtVCitmUTox7MJ5H4dwB9eu4S47efvedRq0tlUUcUFPBrdS6T6mHo9VGOfx0RlRCFw%3D%3D) Reaching our goal is critical to Brian’s efforts to ensure honesty and transparency in the House.
With your help, we will have the opportunity to hold the socialist left accountable for their destructive and obstructionist behavior against our nation. **[Take a stand now to help us reach our crucial goal.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=f651d5e079f2424a837314d42c46f814&_e=3fcftuySzygwFXw4a_CZ7YKy3j5-jsd-_F733c_Xnj9pdtaxg7m4XRToE5w1hIhYJOftU6mC2Yl8xDv9smiLWdplLmD0rQDo7__8Nc8fNrDpnRf-g-sxPOw7op6Zjb19x7Ha5ilQzHfaYrXWc4a-P3XKsQj7BhKPF2A6i7ox9XH_jWvlqoyjyzsY_wClurEaDGxQO_jc-OcGTgxqjToYpM_B_vesC8BqP0irmy1qhds_PYeIEP7NXbEr0JoTbeoUlEDTygDHLZcS1oL79R0dug5uyAK1L-S-HjlgtGE-IrxaNNX8PIFIiTHUIstjDhWbx-T2J2U_3zakLs36IrzOxOqcmsDtGTEAUUc6p56NRaz8t5GS84aJbulhhOyLieqap_QrzDOD2gIJNIw3bGYi56rW4sq99PYJ7n_PI_XFcx6EovUNXkDCi4xua4TH6ofbqmAlYaNZYcVjeJ_EfJvFPw%3D%3D)** [**DONATE**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=f651d5e079f2424a837314d42c46f814&_e=3fcftuySzygwFXw4a_CZ7YKy3j5-jsd-_F733c_Xnj9pdtaxg7m4XRToE5w1hIhYJOftU6mC2Yl8xDv9smiLWdplLmD0rQDo7__8Nc8fNrDpnRf-g-sxPOw7op6Zjb19x7Ha5ilQzHfaYrXWc4a-P3XKsQj7BhKPF2A6i7ox9XH_jWvlqoyjyzsY_wClurEaDGxQO_jc-OcGTgxqjToYpM_B_vesC8BqP0irmy1qhdsF44ohHxSnCmBF865LN-zBxT-OjZ8PlienB_O319fkV3A0qM7A_2p3ET0qn2fZYyqwZZwUShOeVoK2pObgbAiv6I8suINq7WQXe2FxZViFcGeY6oHFEJktXAN3NcrCCSCm6gk1fCmY4tcD583p9I5L8_lxrW9XhX38WaUZyKXgrxT1jr68yTJ0QQQtyqO0DOOJdW5N9fXoV7hHeQvb04Uf3FQQrtIG9QsEZnPGulM7hg%3D%3D) Thank you, Pat Toomey US Senate Pennsylvania

Without a problem solver like Brian in Congress, we will see the devastating effects of socialism and the damage it causes to the people of Pennsylvania and our nation. But we can STOP this from happening! The pathway to taking back the House in 2020 runs directly through Pennsylvania. And that means the fight for freedom begins with you! Reaching our goal is critical to Brian’s efforts to ensure honesty and transparency in the House. With your help, we will have the opportunity to hold the socialist left accountable for their destructive and obstructionist behavior against our nation. Thank you, Pat Toomey US Senate Pennsylvania Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress PO Box 939 Langhorne, PA 19047 This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

name: Booker HQ
subject: Donald Trump is coming.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | The President is holding a rally in Cory's home state tomorrow. Team, **FIRST:** We started Cory's re-election bid by announcing an initial fundraising goal of $250,000 to help us ramp up our campaign. **THEN:** Trump's upcoming rally in our own backyard (right here in Cory's home state of New Jersey) made us decide to go bigger. Last week, we raised our goal even higher to $350,000 -- so we could demonstrate our strong momentum from the very beginning. **NOW:** Well, that rally is happening tomorrow. Trump will be spreading his platform of hatred and bigotry to help re-elect Jeff Van Drew, the Congressman who shamefully switched his party affiliation from Democrat to Republican during the impeachment process. **As Trump and his supporters gather tomorrow night in New Jersey, let 's show Cory that we've got his back by helping re-elect him to the Senate.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200127_BHQ_20200127-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5_v1&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---

No matter what Donald Trump says or does tomorrow night, it's important that we stay focused on our $350,000 goal -- which will help scale up our operation to put us in the best position to win.
To get there, we'll be counting on our Founding Donors and biggest supporters -- people like you. **[Here's where you can help.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200127_BHQ_20200127-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
This is a major test for us just as we're getting this re-election campaign off the ground. But with a team as dedicated and passionate as this one, there's no stopping us.
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200127_BHQ_20200127-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fca/5fca0d19/7ac32327/291d3583/1375345608/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Breaking news about the impeachment trial (Bolton)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | **_New York Times_ Breaking News: "President Donald Trump said he wanted to keep aid to Ukraine frozen until its officials helped him with investigations into Democrats, John Bolton wrote in an unpublished manuscript of a new book"** [**Sign our urgent petition now demanding Republicans allow witnesses like Bolton to testify during Trump 's impeachment trial.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712af/691c9bd/6f090130/11a724ca/2724885844/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment_1_27") | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712af/691c9bd/6f090130/11a724ca/2724885844/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment_1_27")
---
Here's the truth, folks --
With this bombshell report, we now know what John Bolton heard and saw as it relates to Trump's impeachment trial and the withholding of aid to Ukraine's government.
_Heck, we 'll be able to buy it in a book soon!_
**Yet, Washington Republicans like Cory Gardner are still preventing firsthand witnesses like Bolton from telling their story to the American people as part of this impeachment trial.**

| | Peter: Source: [@SpeakerPelosi](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfa8/6e9863e8/833b0c5/1db05374/1068189115/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://twitter.com/SpeakerPelosi/status/1217603802892840965") Speaker Nancy Pelosi is leading the charge against Republican obstruction and abuse of power, rallying Democrats together and fending off GOP attacks with grace and dignity. She held firm in holding on to the articles of impeachment until more evidence came forward, John Bolton offered testimony to the Senate, and Lev Parnas, Giuliani's close associate, handed over damning evidence further implicating the president. But she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. name: Paul Shashy, Campaign Manager
subject: President Trump RIGHT to investigate Bidens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fa2c7690c5f527af/102089b9f798411cc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, The Senate impeachment trial is underway, and it’s clear what’s going on here. _**The Democrats DO NOT want to face President Trump in the 2020 election!**_ Their “case” for impeachment is a joke. They have no evidence of any crime whatsoever, and no credible witnesses to back up their outlandish claims. The fact is, President Trump was RIGHT to call for an investigation into the Bidens and Bursima. The Democrats can deny it all they want, but there is clear evidence of serious corruption – why else would then-Vice President Joe Biden threaten to withhold $1 BILLION in aid unless they fired a prosecutor looking into their dealings? Enough is enough of this HOAX. It’s time for the Democrats to drop this nonsense, stop wasting taxpayer dollars, and get back to work. **[Rush your support today, to help ramp up the pressure on Doug Jones and his pals!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fa2c7690c5f527af/108ef5bdc6556ae8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** The Democrats have been desperate to undo the 2016 election ever since President Trump’s historic victory. That much is clear. First, there was the Russian collusion hoax. clean_body: Peter, The Senate impeachment trial is underway, and it’s clear what’s going on here. The Democrats DO NOT want to face President Trump in the 2020 election! Their “case” for impeachment is a joke. They have no evidence of any crime whatsoever, and no credible witnesses to back up their outlandish claims. The fact is, President Trump was RIGHT to call for an investigation into the Bidens and Bursima. The Democrats can deny it all they want, but there is clear evidence of serious corruption – why else would then-Vice President Joe Biden threaten to withhold $1 BILLION in aid unless they fired a prosecutor looking into their dealings? Enough is enough of this HOAX. It’s time for the Democrats to drop this nonsense, stop wasting taxpayer dollars, and get back to work. The Democrats have been desperate to undo the 2016 election ever since President Trump’s historic victory. That much is clear. First, there was the Russian collusion hoax. Now, it’s this Ukranian hoax. They can’t stand that the American people have put their faith in President Trump, and that he’s delivering RESULTS! Doug Jones is planning to vote to convict and remove President Trump... and he’s claimed that it won’t hurt his re-election chances one bit. Are you ready to prove him wrong? name: Sara 2020
subject: Sign our petition and tell Susan Collins to demand John Bolton testify before the Senate →
body:
We need your help to fight back.

Did you miss this over the weekend?
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802edc/4bef7a87/6a802c67/287f890f/948412183/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/bolton-petition?source=em200127-2-b")
**Friend, it is critical that John Bolton testify so we can get to the bottom of what happened between President Trump and Ukraine. Do you agree?**
**[Sign our petition and tell Susan Collins to demand John Bolton testify before the Senate.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802edc/4bef7a87/6a802c67/287f890f/948412183/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/bolton-petition?source=em200127-2-b")**
**********[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802edc/4bef7a87/6a802c67/287f890f/948412183/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjctMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/bolton-petition?source=em200127-2-b")**********
Susan Collins might have voted against calling John Bolton to testify last week, even after he said he was willing, but we're not done fighting for a fair trial -- and hopefully you aren't either.
Keep fighting,
Team Sara

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Forwarded Message

Sometimes, the headlines of the day can be pretty dire. Catastrophic climate disasters. Violence at home and abroad. Corruption at the highest levels. One attack after another on our civil rights.
But you know what? I am an optimist.
2020 is going to be a turning point that marks a new beginning, a new progressive era.
**I know that our movement can elect a progressive Democratic president, keep the House, and take back the Senate. And then, we get to work, getting America back on track.**
But to do that, we need to build a grassroots movement bigger than any we've ever seen. And that means starting right now. **That's why I've set an ambitious goal of 3000 grassroots donations for January.**
[**Chip in $3. Stand strong with me.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f919/6cd27893/5328e3cb/15862fad/1297080388/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-01-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")
We are going to win all across America. We are going to turn back Trumpism.
But only if we hustle flat-out until the election. That's why I'm asking for your support right now.
[**please donate $3 right now. clean_body: | | | I want to make sure you saw Jeff's message, and that you're all in for our biggest fight yet. 2020 has to endwith a win, which means it has to beginwith a big show of strength from our grassroots movement. That's how we're going to kick Trumpism to the curb. That's how we're going to show Mitch McConnell the door. That's how we're going to save America. "" Molly McGuire Team Merkley Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- Forwarded Message Sometimes, the headlines of the day can be pretty dire. Catastrophic climate disasters. Violence at home and abroad. Corruption at the highest levels. One attack after another on our civil rights. But you know what? I am an optimist. 2020 is going to be a turning point that marks a new beginning, a new progressive era. I know that our movement can elect a progressive Democratic president, keep the House, and take back the Senate. And then, we get to work, getting America back on track. But to do that, we need to build a grassroots movement bigger than any we've ever seen. And that means starting right now. That's why I've set an ambitious goal of 3000 grassroots donations for January. "" We are going to win all across America. We are going to turn back Trumpism. But only if we hustle flat-out until the election. That's why I'm asking for your support right now. "" We can do this! Jeff | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

name: Jason Yates
subject: Take Action: Fox TV is Censoring Pro-Life Super Bowl Ad
body:
| | Peter, For months, Fox TV and Fox Sports have been blocking an ad from being played during Super Bowl Sunday. The compelling ad tells the stories of abortion survivors. There are thousands of survivors of abortion in the United States, and we must not stand by as the mainstream media tries to silence their voices. _Faces of Choice_ , a national advocacy organization that shares the stories of abortion survivors, was told by Fox executives there weren't any more slots available for a 30-second ad during Super Bowl Sunday, but we discovered that’s not true. There are ads spots still available. **We ask for your immediate help. The only way to ensure the pro-life message isn’t censored is to speak up right now.** Fox Sports needs to hear from thousands of pro-life Americans, TODAY! There’s no time to wait. Watch the ad and sign the petition. It will take less than one minute. **[Sign your name and tell Fox TV and Fox Sports to air the Faces of Choice 30-second ad and let the voices of abortion survivors be heard](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBpE0vuVQE_BQTeRbVgKjRSw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200127p2a01nd&n=1)!** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=j7HNdFFdmHSh8w7VvhTEBpE0vuVQE_BQTeRbVgKjRSw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200127p2a01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200127p2a01nd&n=3)
---

name: Team Monika
subject: Did you see Monika's email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
We are making progress, but we are still coming up short.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a2/7dfbb003/42a4dd24/5527cca1/457206764/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Did you see Monika's email from Friday? We wanted to make sure that you saw her message and have time to act. [We are now only $9,860 away from our end of the month goal. Pitch in and help us keep going.](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a2/7dfbb003/42a4dd24/5527cca6/457206764/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress") -Team Monika Friend, I wish I was emailing you today to talk about my platform, why I am running for Congress, my career experiences, or sharing a proud moment about my family. But I'm not writing about any of those things today. I am writing because my campaign needs your help, now more than ever. We have been staffing up and talking to voters as much as we can, but unfortunately these things cost a lot of money. We are only 38 days away from the pivotal primary Election in North Carolina and we are coming up short of our January goal. [To keep this campaign moving we need to raise another $16,000 before January 31st. Is there any way you can chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can so we can keep this campaign moving?](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a2/7dfbb003/42a4dd24/5527cca6/457206764/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9a2/7dfbb003/42a4dd24/5527cca7/457206764/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5")

With Appreciation,
Monika Johnson-Hostler
Democratic Candidate for Congress, NC-02
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. | | | Today we're **kicking off** a new contest for one lucky Mike supporter and their guest to win a trip to the big game in Miami on February 2nd! Why? Because Mike is a proven leader and the **quarterback** that our country needs. After four years of **fumbles** by Donald Trump, it's time to get our country back on track. We're doing just that with our nationwide campaign across 35 states. Thousands of people are out knocking on doors and talking to voters about what matters. [**Tell us why you support Mike on gun safety, climate change, or health care today and you'll be entered to win a trip to Miami!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=f88a425d34&e=f54746ec54)

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: It makes you wonder...🤔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
Who does Donna Shalala fight for? ... [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=cbfa7ff46e8946aa81b54e410e646056&_e=db-mU9jBQNO2udwrJ_n54RInS-70qsNkgIbZRo2I7zROidlwiQBxGeiHSaURKHuPowAiw4wNNki9lUAf4S12bTVu5TOmeVeyU5hHUZKnEthue_4mHcN6TSJlle7Y-8E8KX_ZOlB_8BEOnWpU-0oiPtrVSWocmolOfYNCdVNNtZqE8anGNv_o-ph4KLy90cJIKpSC55z-p5lzkOUkFBix3XCtmYIS97B8Mc_l4prM0VoiIYbEGDd0Kbg4rYxIKhHTQBTQhCl8nGVbSXPg2B5pKDydFu4zvPZVk-lQIrqdfUEEYelpnwktPoPQ8OEGWgoh733Rzq_fwLEnEzmFpiwDDAim3y7ktq9ouTm-PjqwM5cCEeC1-2ghCY4u8zfgKB_w5rdDQBGpZytPcJek3J3JJA%3D%3D) Who does Donna Shalala fight for? _❌ She has been rubbing elbows with the political elite for decades._ _❌ She was endorsed by left-wing progressives like Nancy Pelosi._ _❌ And, she has been silent when the loudest voices in her own party are endorsing socialist policies that will ruin our economy._ **How can Donna Shalala ever fully serve the people of South Florida when she is beholden to the Washington Political Machine that got her elected?** This is why I’ve decided to take on Shalala in November. I’m fueled by my love for this country and a profound passion to faithfully serve the people of South Florida. But that’s not going to be enough. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Support an American hero who can win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
body:
I’ve got news to share. This morning, I endorsed General Don Bolduc to be the next senator from New Hampshire.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from the NRSC,visit here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0.

Friend,

I’ve got news to share. This morning, I endorsed General Don Bolduc to be the
next senator from New Hampshire.

General Bolduc is an American hero. He served in the Army for 36 years, earned
countless medals, and you may have heard of him because General Bolduc led our
soldiers into Afghanistan on horseback to take out the Taliban terrorists. http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Donald Bolduc retired from the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform
does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

This is personal to me because when I was in Afghanistan, I knew that Generals like Don Bolduc—who had integrity, courage, and conviction—were leading the strategy to keep us safe.

General Bolduc has served America his whole life. But now, he needs our help.

He’s running for Senate and he can win. His opponent is a lackluster Liberal who supports Medicare For All and barely won her last election. Now, she’s running against a war hero.

You’ve supported me—now, I’m asking you to support General Bolduc’s campaign.

100% of your contribution will go directly to his team and I’ll consider this a personal favor.

I’ve endorsed General Bolduc because he can win and he should win, solet’s send a conservative war hero to the Senate. http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service,

Tom CottonUnited States Senator for Arkansas
DONATE NOW http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army.
Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.PO Box 7839
Little Rock, AR 72217-7839
PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE

Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for
federal income tax purposes.

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

The NRSC is the sole national committee dedicated to strengthening our
Republican Senate majority. We believe that emails are a vital way for us to
communicate with supporters like you through breaking news alerts on issues and
events critical to the future of our country and our Republican Senate majority.
This committee is 100% committed to defeating all Democrat Senate candidates
this cycle, but we rely on the generosity of supporters like you. 99% of the
NRSC’s donations come from small donations from our grassroots supporters.

This message reflects our committee’s views and opinions. You are receiving this
email because you signed up as a member of our online grassroots community. If
you would like to make a contribution, please visit our website here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0. While it is more cost-effective for our committee and our Senate campaigns to
receive donations online, we do accept donations through mail. If you would prefer to mail in your donation, you can print off our donation form here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 and send it to our committee.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from the NRSC, visit here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0. You can also view our Privacy Policy here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE2Mzg4NzgS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTY4MjQ5OTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0. We thank you for your continued support this cycle.
